allies.rationale_text: Scientific-method-evidence-testing strengthens data-science-reasoning-framework by keeping hypotheses tied to explicit tests and disconfirmation.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Data-science-reasoning-framework conflicts with empathy when metric optimization suppresses stakeholder-context signals that explain behavior shifts.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved only current-vocabulary first-order seams that were explicit or cleanly warranted by the raw source.
donor_drops: Did not keep donor-shaped or out-of-vocabulary relation surfaces; omission beat weak forcing.
open_questions: Higher-order candidates remain observational only and belong in later selective review rather than in this closure batch.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only for this model.
antagonists: Any broader antagonistic surface not preserved here was omitted because the current first-order vocabulary did not justify forcing it.
structured_tensions: Only explicit or cleanly source-supported tensions that survive current-vocabulary discipline were preserved.
